response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across web, mobile, and some embedded-adjacent work, but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, there is no demonstrated experience with C for UNIX embedded development in recent years (last C/C++ work was 2014-2015 at National Instruments), and no evidence of Linux kernel source modification, LAN-switch firmware, MACsec/802.1X, or chip-vendor SDK experience. The skill set is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js/DLang focused, which does not align with embedded network security firmware development.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure with exposure to low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments on developer tooling
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, test frameworks) valuable for QA collaboration
concerns: No indication of native-level Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No Linux kernel modification, MACsec, 802.1X, or LAN-switch firmware experience
C programming experience is over a decade old; recent work is web/cloud TypeScript, not embedded UNIX

key_factors.factor: No embedded security / Linux kernel / LAN-switch experience
